'''âr-zh-h''' ('''karazhah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stargaze|stargaze]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-zh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stargaze|stargaze]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-zh-h
|-
! Lemma
| karazhah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirazhah|thirazhah]] || [[word:jirazhah|jirazhah]] || [[word:shirazhah|shirazhah]] || [[word:kirazhah|kirazhah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurazhah|thuthurazhah]] || [[word:jujurazhah|jujurazhah]] || [[word:shushurazhah|shushurazhah]] || [[word:kukurazhah|kukurazhah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurazhah|thurazhah]] || [[word:jurazhah|jurazhah]] || [[word:shurazhah|shurazhah]] || [[word:kurazhah|kurazhah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurazhah|thurazhah]] || [[word:jurazhah|jurazhah]] || [[word:shurazhah|shurazhah]] || [[word:kurazhah|kurazhah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therazhah|therazhah]] || [[word:jerazhah|jerazhah]] || [[word:sherazhah|sherazhah]] || [[word:kerazhah|kerazhah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorazhah|thothorazhah]] || [[word:jojorazhah|jojorazhah]] || [[word:shoshorazhah|shoshorazhah]] || [[word:kokorazhah|kokorazhah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorazhah|thorazhah]] || [[word:jorazhah|jorazhah]] || [[word:shorazhah|shorazhah]] || [[word:korazhah|korazhah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorazhah|thorazhah]] || [[word:jorazhah|jorazhah]] || [[word:shorazhah|shorazhah]] || [[word:korazhah|korazhah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrazhah|thĂŠrazhah]] || [[word:jĂŠrazhah|jĂŠrazhah]] || [[word:shĂŠrazhah|shĂŠrazhah]] || [[word:kĂŠrazhah|kĂŠrazhah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharazhah|thatharazhah]] || [[word:jajarazhah|jajarazhah]] || [[word:shasharazhah|shasharazhah]] || [[word:kakarazhah|kakarazhah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharazhah|tharazhah]] || [[word:jarazhah|jarazhah]] || [[word:sharazhah|sharazhah]] || [[word:karazhah|karazhah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharazhah|tharazhah]] || [[word:jarazhah|jarazhah]] || [[word:sharazhah|sharazhah]] || [[word:karazhah|karazhah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharazhah|sharazhah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharazhah|gosharazhah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharazhah|gokisharazhah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharazhahnĂŒ|sharazhahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharazhahnknĂŒ|gosharazhahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharazhahnĂŒ|gokisharazhahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharazhahshĂ«|sharazhahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharazhahnkshĂ«|gosharazhahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharazhahshĂ«|gokisharazhahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharazhahro|sharazhahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharazhahnkro|gosharazhahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharazhahro|gokisharazhahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharazhahmu|sharazhahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharazhahnkmu|gosharazhahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharazhahmu|gokisharazhahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharazhahsher|sharazhahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharazhahnksher|gosharazhahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharazhahsher|gokisharazhahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharazhahng|sharazhahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharazhahnkng|gosharazhahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharazhahng|gokisharazhahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharazhahya|sharazhahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharazhahnkya|gosharazhahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharazhahya|gokisharazhahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharazhahyam|sharazhahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharazhahnkyam|gosharazhahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharazhahyam|gokisharazhahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharazhahnĂŒshĂ«|sharazhahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharazhahnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharazhahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharazhahnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharazhahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharazhahnĂŒro|sharazhahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharazhahnknĂŒro|gosharazhahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharazhahnĂŒro|gokisharazhahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharazhahnĂŒmu|sharazhahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharazhahnknĂŒmu|gosharazhahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharazhahnĂŒmu|gokisharazhahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharazhahshĂ«nĂŒ|sharazhahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharazhahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharazhahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharazhahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharazhahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharazhahshĂ«ro|sharazhahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharazhahnkshĂ«ro|gosharazhahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharazhahshĂ«ro|gokisharazhahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharazhahshĂ«mu|sharazhahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharazhahnkshĂ«mu|gosharazhahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharazhahshĂ«mu|gokisharazhahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharazhahronĂŒ|sharazhahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharazhahnkronĂŒ|gosharazhahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharazhahronĂŒ|gokisharazhahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharazhahroshĂ«|sharazhahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharazhahnkroshĂ«|gosharazhahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharazhahroshĂ«|gokisharazhahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharazhahromu|sharazhahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharazhahnkromu|gosharazhahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharazhahromu|gokisharazhahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharazhahmunĂŒ|sharazhahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharazhahnkmunĂŒ|gosharazhahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharazhahmunĂŒ|gokisharazhahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharazhahmushĂ«|sharazhahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharazhahnkmushĂ«|gosharazhahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharazhahmushĂ«|gokisharazhahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharazhahmuro|sharazhahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharazhahnkmuro|gosharazhahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharazhahmuro|gokisharazhahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
